title: Tomato Pantry Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta until al dente.
Cook garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
Add canned tomatoes and chili flakes, then simmer.
Toss pasta with the sauce and season to taste.

title: Chickpea Coconut Curry
instructions: Cook onion and garlic until soft.
Add curry powder and stir for one minute.
Add chickpeas and coconut milk, then simmer.
Serve with cooked rice.

title: Egg Fried Rice
instructions: Fry cooked rice in a hot pan.
Push rice aside and scramble eggs.
Add frozen peas and soy sauce.
Finish with sliced spring onion.

title: Greek Chickpea Feta Salad
instructions: Rinse chickpeas.
Chop cucumber and tomatoes.
Toss chickpeas, vegetables, and feta with olive oil and lemon.
Season and serve chilled.

title: Lentil Tomato Soup
instructions: Cook onion and carrot until softened.
Add red lentils, canned tomatoes, and vegetable stock.
Simmer until lentils are tender.
Blend partly for a thicker soup.

title: Black Bean Breakfast Tacos
instructions: Warm black beans with cumin.
Scramble eggs in a pan.
Fill tortillas with beans, eggs, salsa, and cheddar cheese.
Fold and serve warm.

title: Peanut Noodle Bowl
instructions: Cook noodles according to package directions.
Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, garlic, and lime juice.
Steam frozen vegetables.
Toss noodles and vegetables with peanut sauce.

title: White Bean Garlic Soup
instructions: Cook onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add white beans, vegetable stock, and dried thyme.
Simmer for 15 minutes.
Mash some beans to thicken the soup.

title: Tuna Rice Bowl
instructions: Cook or reheat rice.
Mix canned tuna with mayonnaise and soy sauce.
Slice cucumber.
Serve tuna over rice with cucumber and sesame seeds.

title: Spinach Feta Omelette
instructions: Wilt spinach in olive oil.
Beat eggs with black pepper.
Pour eggs into the pan and cook gently.
Add feta, fold, and serve.

title: Miso Mushroom Rice Soup
instructions: Simmer mushrooms in vegetable stock.
Add cooked rice and soy sauce.
Turn off heat and stir in miso paste.
Top with spring onion.

title: Red Lentil Dal
instructions: Cook onion and garlic until soft.
Add curry powder, red lentils, and canned tomatoes.
Simmer with water until lentils break down.
Serve with rice.

title: Pesto White Bean Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Warm white beans and spinach in a pan.
Toss pasta with pesto and beans.
Finish with parmesan cheese and lemon.

title: Sweet Potato Black Bean Wraps
instructions: Dice and roast or microwave sweet potato until tender.
Warm black beans with cumin.
Fill tortillas with sweet potato, beans, salsa, and lettuce.
Wrap tightly and serve.

title: Turkey Bean Chili
instructions: Brown ground turkey with onion.
Add chili powder and stir.
Add kidney beans, canned tomatoes, and corn.
Simmer until thick.

title: Shakshuka
instructions: Cook onion and garlic until soft.
Add canned tomatoes and paprika, then simmer.
Make wells and crack in eggs.
Cover until eggs are set and finish with feta.

title: Oatmeal Banana Pancakes
instructions: Blend oats, banana, eggs, milk, baking powder, and cinnamon.
Heat a lightly oiled pan.
Cook small pancakes until bubbles form.
Flip and cook until golden.

title: Kimchi Tofu Fried Rice
instructions: Crumble tofu and fry until lightly browned.
Add kimchi and cooked rice.
Season with soy sauce and sesame oil.
Finish with spring onion.

title: Moroccan Chickpea Couscous
instructions: Simmer carrot, chickpeas, cumin, and raisins in vegetable stock.
Pour hot mixture over couscous.
Cover until couscous is tender.
Fluff and serve.

title: Creamy Tomato Tortellini Soup
instructions: Simmer canned tomatoes, garlic, and vegetable stock.
Add tortellini and cook until tender.
Stir in cream and spinach.
Season and serve warm.

title: Hummus Veggie Wrap
instructions: Spread hummus over tortillas.
Add cucumber, carrot, lettuce, and chickpeas.
Roll tightly.
Slice and serve.

title: Chicken Pesto Rice Skillet
instructions: Cook chicken breast pieces in olive oil.
Add cooked rice and cherry tomatoes.
Stir in pesto and spinach.
Cook until spinach wilts.

title: Coconut Black Bean Soup
instructions: Cook onion and garlic until soft.
Add black beans, coconut milk, and cumin.
Simmer for 15 minutes.
Finish with lime juice.

title: Caprese Pasta Salad
instructions: Cook pasta and cool under running water.
Chop tomatoes and mozzarella.
Toss pasta with tomatoes, mozzarella, olive oil, basil, and balsamic vinegar.
Season and serve chilled.

title: Savory Oatmeal with Egg
instructions: Cook oats with water until creamy.
Stir in spinach and soy sauce.
Fry or poach eggs.
Top oats with eggs, spring onion, and sesame oil.

title: Quinoa Edamame Bowl
instructions: Cook quinoa until fluffy.
Steam edamame.
Slice cucumber and carrot.
Serve quinoa with vegetables, edamame, soy sauce, and sesame seeds.

title: Sardine Tomato Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Cook garlic in olive oil.
Add canned tomatoes, canned sardines, and capers.
Toss sauce with pasta.

title: Tofu Scramble Breakfast Wrap
instructions: Crumble tofu and cook with turmeric.
Add black beans and spinach.
Warm tortillas.
Fill tortillas with tofu scramble and salsa.

title: Minestrone with White Beans
instructions: Cook onion and carrot until softened.
Add canned tomatoes, vegetable stock, and white beans.
Simmer for 15 minutes.
Add pasta and cook until tender.

title: Thai Basil Chicken Rice
instructions: Cook ground chicken with garlic.
Add soy sauce and chili flakes.
Stir in basil until wilted.
Serve over cooked rice.
